sentence: 新校区离市中心比较远。
pinyin: Xīn xiàoqū lí shì zhōngxīn bǐjiào yuǎn.
english: The new campus is quite far from downtown.

sentence: 历史书上提到了那支著名的集团军。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shū shàng tídào le nà zhī zhùmíng de jítuánjūn.
english: The history book mentioned that famous army group.

sentence: 他从小的梦想是成为一名音乐家。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo de mèngxiǎng shì chéngwéi yī míng yīnyuèjiā.
english: His dream since childhood was to become a musician.

sentence: 市政府发布了禁止燃放烟花的禁令。
pinyin: Shì zhèngfǔ fābù le jìnzhǐ ránfàng yānhuā de jìnlìng.
english: The city government issued a ban on setting off fireworks.

meaning: 1. adopted son (traditional adoption, i.e. without legal ramifications
sentence: 他把邻居的孩子认作干儿子。
pinyin: Tā bǎ línjū de háizi rèn zuò gān érzi.
english: He took the neighbor's child as his adopted son.

sentence: 从这里到机场大约有二十英里。
pinyin: Cóng zhèlǐ dào jīchǎng dàyuē yǒu èrshí yīnglǐ.
english: It is about twenty miles from here to the airport.

meaning: outside the law; beyond the law; extrajudicial
sentence: 没有人可以凌驾于法律之上，在法外横行。
pinyin: Méi yǒu rén kě yǐ líng jià yú fǎ lǜ zhī shàng, zài fǎ wài héng xíng.
english: No one can be above the law and act outside it.

meaning: long table; counter; (coll.) case (criminal, medical etc); matter; pro
sentence: 侦探接手了一个复杂的案子。
pinyin: Zhēn tàn jiē shǒu le yī gè fù zá de àn zi.
english: The detective took on a complicated case.

meaning: to line up; to stand in line; (fig.) to take sides; to side with sb; t
sentence: 同事之间闹矛盾，他不想站队。
pinyin: Tóng shì zhī jiān nào máo dùn, tā bù xiǎng zhàn duì.
english: His colleagues had a conflict, and he didn't want to take sides.

sentence: 印刷厂今天开始制版，明天就能出货。
pinyin: Yìn shuā chǎng jīn tiān kāi shǐ zhì bǎn, míng tiān jiù néng chū huò.
english: The print shop starts making plates today and can ship tomorrow.

meaning: fifth of the five night watch periods 03:00-05:00 (old)
sentence: 古时候人们在五更时分就要起床了。
pinyin: Gǔ shí hòu rén men zài wǔ gēng shí fēn jiù yào qǐ chuáng le.
english: In ancient times, people had to get up at the fifth watch (around 3–5 a.m.).

sentence: 医生问他最近是否有不安全的性行。
pinyin: Yī shēng wèn tā zuì jìn shì fǒu yǒu bù ān quán de xìng xíng.
english: The doctor asked whether he had engaged in any unsafe sexual activity recently.

meaning: no matter if; regardless of; don’t worry about (it, him etc); doesn’t
sentence: 管它下不下雨，我们照常出发。
pinyin: Guǎn tā xià bù xià yǔ, wǒ men zhào cháng chū fā.
english: Rain or not, we'll set off as planned.

sentence: 健身房的器材都是新买的，很齐全。
pinyin: Jiànshēnfáng de qìcái dōu shì xīn mǎi de, hěn qíquán.
english: The gym equipment is all newly purchased and very complete.

sentence: 他熬夜太多，以致身体越来越差。
pinyin: Tā áoyè tài duō, yǐ zhì shēntǐ yuè lái yuè chà.
english: He stayed up too many late nights, to the point that his health kept getting worse.

sentence: 他喜欢在咖啡馆听爵士音乐。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān zài kāfēiguǎn tīng juéshì yīnyuè.
english: He likes listening to jazz music at the café.

sentence: 这款手机和同类产品相比性价比更高。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī hé tónglèi chǎnpǐn xiāngbǐ xìngjiàbǐ gèng gāo.
english: Compared to similar products, this phone offers better value for money.

meaning: 1. bewildered; 2. perplexed; 3. confused; 4. difficult problem; 5. per
sentence: 他看着这道数学题，一脸困惑。
pinyin: Tā kànzhe zhè dào shùxué tí, yì liǎn kùnhuò.
english: He stared at the math problem with a completely puzzled look on his face.

meaning: 1. to demolish a building and relocate the inhabitants
sentence: 那片旧房子要拆迁了。
pinyin: Nà piàn jiù fángzi yào chāiqiān le.
english: Those old houses are going to be demolished and relocated.

sentence: 这双鞋的售价是六百块，现在打八折。
pinyin: Zhè shuāng xié de shòujià shì liùbǎi kuài, xiànzài dǎ bā zhé.
english: The selling price of these shoes is 600 yuan, and they're currently 20% off.

meaning: 1. to put on display; 2. to be on show; 3. to exhibit
sentence: 博物馆正在展出一批珍贵文物。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn zhèngzài zhǎnchū yī pī zhēnguì wénwù.
english: The museum is currently exhibiting a collection of precious artifacts.

meaning: to open to traffic (e.g. new bridge, rail line etc); (of a locality) t
sentence: 新地铁线下个月就要通车了。
pinyin: Xīn dìtiě xiàn xià gè yuè jiùyào tōngchē le.
english: The new subway line will open to traffic next month.

sentence: 他穿了一件灰色的外套去上班。
pinyin: Tā chuān le yī jiàn huīsè de wàitào qù shàngbān.
english: He wore a gray coat to work.

sentence: 她给朋友写了一张生日卡片。
pinyin: Tā gěi péngyou xiě le yī zhāng shēngrì kǎpiàn.
english: She wrote a birthday card for her friend.

sentence: 这台空调的功率太高，很费电。
pinyin: Zhè tái kōngtiáo de gōnglǜ tài gāo, hěn fèi diàn.
english: This air conditioner's power rating is too high and uses a lot of electricity.

sentence: 他从小就梦想参与航天事业。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù mèngxiǎng cānyù hángtiān shìyè.
english: He has dreamed of working in space flight since childhood.

sentence: 这部电影讲的是星际旅行的故事。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng jiǎng de shì xīngjì lǚxíng de gùshi.
english: This movie is about interstellar travel.

sentence: 他在终端里输入命令来运行程序。
pinyin: Tā zài zhōngduān lǐ shūrù mìnglìng lái yùnxíng chéngxù.
english: He typed commands in the terminal to run the program.

sentence: 很多发展中国家正在努力改善教育。
pinyin: Hěn duō fāzhǎnzhōng guójiā zhèngzài nǔlì gǎishàn jiàoyù.
english: Many developing countries are working hard to improve education.

sentence: 我把手机推送通知都关掉了。
pinyin: Wǒ bǎ shǒujī tuīsòng tōngzhī dōu guān diào le.
english: I turned off all push notifications on my phone.

sentence: 新一代的手机电池续航更长。
pinyin: Xīn yīdài de shǒujī diànchí xùháng gèng cháng.
english: The new generation of phones has longer battery life.

sentence: 洪水引发了次生灾害，道路受损。
pinyin: Hóngshuǐ yǐnfā le cìshēng zāihài, dàolù shòusǔn.
english: The flood triggered secondary disasters, damaging roads.

sentence: 他在游戏里扮演一位伯爵。
pinyin: Tā zài yóuxì lǐ bànyǎn yī wèi bójué.
english: He plays the role of an earl in the game.

sentence: 主教在教堂里主持了婚礼。
pinyin: Zhǔjiào zài jiàotáng lǐ zhǔchí le hūnlǐ.
english: The bishop presided over the wedding ceremony in the church.

sentence: 她全副心思都放在备考上。
pinyin: Tā quánfù xīnsi dōu fàng zài bèikǎo shàng.
english: Her full attention was on preparing for the exam.

sentence: 新公司还在完善内部建制。
pinyin: Xīn gōng sī hái zài wán shàn nèi bù jiàn zhì.
english: The new company is still refining its internal organizational structure.

meaning: venerable middle-aged or elderly man, usually wearing an artificial be
sentence: 他在剧团里专门扮演老生角色。
pinyin: Tā zài jù tuán lǐ zhuān mén bàn yǎn lǎo shēng jué sè.
english: He specializes in playing the laosheng (elderly male) roles in the opera troupe.

sentence: 她每天早上给宝宝冲一罐奶粉。
pinyin: Tā měi tiān zǎo shang gěi bǎo bao chōng yī guàn nǎi fěn.
english: She mixes a can of powdered milk for the baby every morning.

sentence: 这家咖啡馆依托大学校园，生意很好。
pinyin: Zhè jiā kāfēiguǎn yī tuō dàxué xiàoyuán, shēngyì hěn hǎo.
english: This café relies on the university campus and does great business.

meaning: 1. in between; 2. within that interval; 3. in the meantime
sentence: 他在北京工作了三年，其间学会了很多东西。
pinyin: Tā zài Běijīng gōngzuò le sān nián, qíjiān xuéhuì le hěn duō dōngxi.
english: He worked in Beijing for three years, and in that time he learned a great deal.

meaning: 1. to take the lead; 2. to be the first; 3. to set an example
sentence: 他主动带头把教室打扫干净。
pinyin: Tā zhǔdòng dàitóu bǎ jiàoshì dǎsǎo gānjìng.
english: He took the initiative to lead the way in cleaning the classroom.

meaning: 1. cigarette; 2. smoke from burning incense; 3. CL:支[zhī],條|条[tiáo]
sentence: 他戒香烟已经三个月了。
pinyin: Tā jiè xiāngyān yǐjīng sān gè yuè le.
english: He has quit smoking cigarettes for three months now.

sentence: 工人们正在浇筑混凝土。
pinyin: Gōngrénmen zhèngzài jiāozhù hùnníngtǔ.
english: The workers are pouring concrete.

sentence: 法院对此案作出了最终裁定。
pinyin: Fǎyuàn duì cǐ àn zuòchū le zuìzhōng cáidìng.
english: The court issued its final ruling on the case.

sentence: 今年销售额增长了五个百分点。
pinyin: Jīnnián xiāoshòu'é zēngzhǎng le wǔ gè bǎifēndiǎn.
english: This year's sales grew by five percentage points.

sentence: 他出差一周后终于归来了。
pinyin: Tā chūchāi yī zhōu hòu zhōngyú guīlái le.
english: He finally returned after a week away on a business trip.

sentence: 楼上的邻居昨晚一直在走动。
pinyin: Lóu shàng de línjū zuówǎn yīzhí zài zǒudòng.
english: The upstairs neighbor was walking around all night.

sentence: 孩子们九点就上床睡觉了。
pinyin: Háizimen jiǔ diǎn jiù shàngchuáng shuìjiào le.
english: The children went to bed at nine o'clock.

sentence: 量子计算机将来可能改变很多行业。
pinyin: Liàngzǐ jìsuànjī jiānglái kěnéng gǎibiàn hěn duō hángyè.
english: Quantum computers may change many industries in the future.

sentence: 公司很重视保护自己的知识产权。
pinyin: Gōngsī hěn zhòngshì bǎohù zìjǐ de zhīshi chǎnquán.
english: The company takes protecting its intellectual property rights very seriously.
